author: Max
title: Quality Checks Interfacing
description: Review Account Statement Logic, Data exports,

author: System
title: Collaboration Model – Interactive Onboarding Guide
description: Enhance the Collaboration Model page into an interactive onboarding experience. Features: Step-by-step tutorial for new vibe-coders, interactive code sandbox for practice, FAQ section based on real user questions, video walkthroughs, progress tracking for onboarding completion, best practice library with prompt templates.

author: System
title: Global Holiday Calendar & Working Day Calculation
description: Extend the working day calculation (currently Lisbon holidays only) to support all team locations. Features: Holiday calendars for Germany, Portugal, Austria (team locations), automatic working day calculation for planning, integration with Interfacing Planning page for realistic deadline setting, bank holiday awareness for payment due dates.

author: System
title: SAP Direct API Integration (Replace CSV Import)
description: Replace manual CSV file uploads with direct SAP API connection. Features: Real-time or scheduled data pull from SAP (FI/CO modules), automatic account balance synchronization, eliminate manual CSV export/import cycle, error-free data transfer, configurable data refresh schedule. Major time saver – eliminates the entire manual data import step (~3h/month).

author: System
title: Automated Interest Calculation on Overdue Amounts
description: Calculate interest on overdue franchise receivables. Features: Configurable interest rates per country/contract, automatic interest accrual based on overdue days, interest amount display on statements (currently excluded per "excl. Interest Amount" label), interest invoice generation, compliance with local interest regulations. Needed to enforce payment discipline.

author: System
title: Docker & Cloud Deployment
description: Containerize the application for production deployment. Features: Dockerfile for frontend and backend, Docker Compose for local development, Kubernetes manifests or Azure/AWS deployment config, environment-based configuration (dev/staging/prod), automated database migrations on deployment, health checks and monitoring endpoints. Prerequisite for team-wide and production use.

author: System
title: Automated Testing Suite
description: End-to-end and unit testing framework. Features: Unit tests for calculation logic (statement generation, KPIs, FX rates), integration tests for API endpoints, E2E tests for critical workflows (upload -> statement -> export), regression test suite for statement accuracy, CI/CD pipeline integration. Ensures reliability as the codebase grows with multiple developers.

author: System
title: Comprehensive Audit Trail & Activity Logging
description: Track all user actions for compliance and debugging. Features: Log every data change (who changed what, when, old vs. new value), statement correction history with full diff, data import audit log (who uploaded, what changed), API access logging, exportable audit reports for internal audit team. Essential for SOX compliance and data governance.

author: System
title: Executive Dashboard & KPI Analytics
description: A comprehensive dashboard for management reporting. Features: Aggregate KPIs across all countries (total open balance, DSO, overdue ratios), trend charts (month-over-month, year-over-year), drill-down from portfolio to country to transaction level, configurable threshold alerts, export to PowerPoint for management presentations. Provides real-time visibility into franchise financial health.

author: System
title: Franchise Partner Self-Service Portal
description: A read-only portal for franchise partners to access their own statements and documents. Features: Partner login with restricted access to own country data only, download interfacing statements (PDF/XLSX), view open balance and payment history, raise queries/disputes on statement items, document upload for partner-side evidence. Reduces email traffic and improves partner satisfaction.

author: System
title: Automated Statement Reconciliation
description: Automatic reconciliation of interfacing statements with SAP balances. Features: Compare statement totals with SAP account balances per country, highlight discrepancies automatically, generate reconciliation report, track unreconciled items, historical reconciliation archive. Currently done manually in Excel.

author: Max A.
title: AI Token Cost Estimation per Ticket
description: Enable AI-based token cost estimation for feature tickets. Features: Analyze ticket description complexity, estimate token consumption based on task type (UI, backend, DB, integration), track actual vs. estimated tokens per implementation, cost reporting per sub-app, budget alerts. Helps forecast AI development costs and optimize prompt strategies.

author: System
title: Automation Leaderboard Scoring Engine
description: Implement the actual scoring logic for the Automation Leaderboard. Features: Define scoring criteria (FTE saved, features shipped, code quality, documentation), weighted score calculation, historical score tracking over time, team vs. individual scores, gamification elements (achievements, streaks). Currently uses dummy data on Home page.

author: System
title: Jira Bidirectional Integration
description: Connect ticket system with Jira. Features: Push tickets from App Requests to Jira (button exists, needs backend), sync status changes bidirectionally, pull Jira ticket updates back into the portal, link Jira sprint planning with release schedule calendar. Currently only a UI button without backend integration.

author: System
title: B2P Controlling Sub-App
description: Build out the B2P Controlling sub-application with dedicated pages. Steps: Partner Requests & Reconciliation (manage partner inquiries and reconciliation workflows), Parameter Maintenance (B2P-specific parameters), VPF (Variable Performance Fee calculation), Bonus & Accruals (bonus tracking and accrual management), Month End Processes (closing activities), Reporting & Controlling (B2P-specific dashboards and KPIs). Currently shown as process steps on Home – needs full page implementation.

author: System
title: Multi-Currency Support & FX Management
description: Support for non-EUR franchise countries. Features: Automatic exchange rate fetching (ECB rates), statement generation in local currency alongside EUR, FX gain/loss tracking, historical rate archive, configurable rate source. Required for franchise partners outside the Eurozone.

author: System
title: Automated Dunning Process
description: Systematic dunning workflow for overdue franchise receivables. Features: Configurable dunning levels (1st reminder, 2nd reminder, final notice), automatic dunning letter generation based on overdue amounts in Mandant Management, dunning history per country, escalation rules, integration with payment block status. Reduces manual follow-up effort and improves cash collection.

author: System
title: Automated Email Notifications
description: Automated email system for franchise partners and internal team. Features: Send interfacing statements as PDF attachments via email to franchise partners, configurable email templates per country/language, reminder emails for overdue payments, internal notifications for approval deadlines, email log and delivery tracking. Eliminates manual email preparation (~2h/month).

author: System
title: Deposit Management & Calculation
description: Full deposit lifecycle management. Features: Import deposit data from SAP (already uploadable), calculate deposit held vs. deposit due per country, track deposit movements over time, integrate deposit balances into interfacing statements (currently placeholder XXX EUR), alert when deposit falls below threshold. Replaces manual deposit tracking in spreadsheets.

author: System
title: User & Role Management (Sixt Auth Integration)
description: Implement a user authentication and role-based access control system. Phase 1: Basic role concept (Admin, Creator, Reviewer, Viewer) with permission matrix per sub-app. Phase 2: Integration with Sixt corporate authentication (SSO, Active Directory). Features: Login/logout, session management, role assignment per user, sub-app level permissions, audit log of user actions. Critical for multi-user production deployment.

author: System
title: FSM Budget Management
description: Budget planning and tracking for FSM. Features: Annual budget creation per country, monthly budget vs. actual tracking, variance analysis with drill-down, re-forecasting capabilities, integration with calculation engine for projections. Sub-app: FSM-Calculation > Budget Management.

author: System
title: FSM Reporting & Analytics
description: Reporting module for FSM calculations. Features: Monthly/quarterly franchise fee reports, country comparison dashboards, trend analysis and forecasting, PDF/XLSX export of reports, drill-down from summary to transaction level. Sub-app: FSM-Calculation > Reporting.

author: System
title: FSM Bookings Management
description: Bookings integration for FSM calculations. Features: Import and display booking data (rental agreements, fleet data), link bookings to calculation parameters, variance analysis between actual vs. calculated fees, data quality checks on booking imports. Sub-app: FSM-Calculation > Bookings.

author: System
title: FSM Calculation Parameters
description: Parameter management for the FSM calculation engine. Features: Define calculation parameters (rates, thresholds, multipliers), version control for parameter sets, effective date management, parameter approval workflow. Sub-app: FSM-Calculation > Calc. Parameter.

author: System
title: FSM Calculation Engine
description: Core FSM calculation module. Implements the Franchise Statement Modernization calculation logic: fee structures, royalty calculations, benchmark comparisons, what-if scenarios. Replaces current Excel-based calculations with a centralized, auditable engine. Sub-app: FSM-Calculation > Calculation.

author: System
title: Payment Terms Configuration
description: Define and manage payment terms per franchise partner. Features: Standard payment term definitions (Net 30, Net 60, custom), country-specific payment conditions, grace period configuration, interest rate settings for overdue amounts. Enables dynamic due date calculations on statements instead of manual overrides.

author: System
title: Account Mapping Management
description: Manage GL account to statement section mappings. Features: Map SAP GL accounts to Clearing/Billing/Account Statement sections, configure A/P and A/R account assignments per country, deposit account configuration, reconciliation account setup. Reduces manual mapping errors and makes the system self-documenting for auditors.

author: System
title: Country Parameters Configuration
description: Configure country-specific parameters: tax rate configuration per country, currency and exchange rate settings, regional compliance parameters (VAT rules, withholding tax), franchise fee structures and royalty rates. Currently hardcoded or managed in spreadsheets – centralizing these reduces errors and speeds up onboarding of new franchise partners.

author: System
title: Automated Data Quality Checks
description: Automated validation of imported SAP data and interfacing statements. Features: Detect missing/duplicate invoices, flag unusual amount deviations (>50% variance), cross-check SAP balances vs. statement totals, validate master data completeness (address, tax IDs), generate quality score per country, full audit trail. Eliminates manual spot-checking and reduces error rate.

author: System
title: Approval Flow – Highway Integration
description: Integrate the Highway approval system for interfacing documents. Features: Review interfacing statements before approval, automated submission to Highway, download documents for manual processing, track approval status across all countries. Reduces manual email/approval cycles and ensures audit trail compliance.

author: System
title: Interfacing Document Creation
description: Automated monthly interfacing statement generation for all franchise countries. Includes PDF and XLSX export, bulk download, preview functionality, editable statements with manual corrections, and multi-version tracking. Saves ~5h/month of manual document preparation work.
